title: Trump backs lighter AI rules, warns China could overtake the US in AI and crypto otherwise
description: Donald Trump says the US must remain the world's leader in artificial intelligence and cryptocurrencies, warning that if innovation slows, China could seize the lead in two technologies he believes will shape the global economy for decades. He also argues for lighter regulation to help America stay ahead.
